title: UNGLINGA 100+ Science Lab Experiments Kit for Kids, STEM Activities Educational Scientist Toys Gifts Chemistry Set, Gemstone, Volcano, Glowing Worms, Fizzy Reaction
features: OVER 100 SCIENCE EXPERIMENTS KIT THAT INSPIRES - This kit contains 75 of our most popular earth, chemistry, and magic. Additional experiments are using common household items. Encourages children to critically think and problem solves and will help sharpen their science and math skills.

EARTH SCIENCE LEARN - Kids will build and erupt a volcano, create a SNOW mountain, Lava Lamp and dig up a real gemstone! They'll also receive an awesome of real rock and minerals for their collection.

CHEMISTRY EXPERIENCE - The chemistry set in this kit has everything kids need to make glowing worms and dolphins create bubbling reactions fizzy solutions, blow a balloon, make pop rainbow rain, colourful foamy fountain and much more.
MAGIC OF SCIENCE PLAY - Some of the science reaction kids will learn to change the colour of water, fix a dented ping pong ball and make a paper clip float!

HIGH-QUALITY EDUCATIONAL TOYS - Kids will have hours of fun as they explore the multiple experiments and it is great to share with family, friends, or classmates; Just like a real scientist in a lab! All ingredients included are safe and child friendly. If your experience kit is anything questions, let us know so we can make it right for you.
description: Product Description 100+ Earth Science Actives & Chemistry Experienments Smart Science Concepts & Hands-On Science Activity Kit This phenomenal Science kit gives kids the chance to experience the scientific process in a hands-on way, just like a real scientist! There are so many activities and experiments to try that they'll be busy for hours, exploring the fascinating world of chemistry. Learning that encompasses the five basic Science principles is key Safety glasses Protect your kids’ eyes all-round, a transparent and clear lens lets kids have good vision in any environment. Experiements manual Clearly written and illustrated instruction manual will also guide your child on an easy to follow step-by-step learning excursion through each experiment. Real life tools This set's kid-safe science tools are sized just right for little hands! Made from durable plastic, these tools clean and store easily when the experiment time is done!
